task_scope.window_rule: same employee, same expense type, within 7 days of clue record date (2025-02-03)

policy_questions.question: Does Article 11 of 01_expense_reimbursement_2025 prohibit split reimbursement?
policy_questions.answer: Yes. Article 11 prohibits splitting the same or similar matters into multiple reimbursements to circumvent approval authority.

policy_questions.question: What is the applicable approval threshold for checking split reimbursement?
policy_questions.answer: Per Article 11, if same employee/same type within 7 days has 2+ records and the combined amount reaches a higher tier in 03_authorization_management Annex 2, split circumvention should be investigated.

data_questions.question: What other records exist for E9001, travel_transport, within 2025-01-27 to 2025-02-10?
data_questions.method: list_expenses with filters on employee_id, expense_type, date range

evidence_requirements: All E9001 travel_transport records within the 7-day window
execution_steps: 2. Query all E9001/travel_transport records within 2025-01-27 to 2025-02-10
3. Analyze if combined amounts reach higher approval tier
4. Check if records share the same underlying matter (client roadshow)
complexity_reasons: Known clue record with direct scope
Simple date-range filter on known employee/type
stopping_conditions: All same-employee/type/7-day records retrieved and analyzed
